mapper.select:
select campaign_no, campaign_title, campaign_status, campaign_goal_member, to_char(campaign_start_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') as campaign_start_date, to_char(campaign_expire_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') as campaign_expire_date from create_campaign_tbl where campaign_status in (2,3,4)
and campaign_title like '%' || #{campaignTitle} || '%'

select campaign_title, campaign_status, campaign_explanation, campaign_goal_member, campaign_start_date, campaign_expire_date - interval '1' day as campaign_expire_date, member_id, (select count(*) from campaign_member_tbl where campaign_no=#{campaignNo})as member_count from create_campaign_tbl ct where campaign_no = #{campaignNo}
mapper.insert: insert into create_campaign_tbl values ( campaign_no_seq.nextval, #{campaignTitle}, #{campaignExplanation}, 0, #{campaignGoalMember}, to_date(#{campaignExpireDate},'yyyy-mm-dd')+1, #{memberId}, null )
mapper.select: select * from campaign_member_tbl cmt join create_campaign_tbl cct on cmt.campaign_no = cct.campaign_no where cct.campaign_no = #{campaignNo}
mapper.update: update create_campaign_tbl set campaign_status=#{campaignStatus} where campaign_no=#{campaignNo}
mapper.select: select campaign_no,campaign_status,campaign_goal_member,campaign_expire_date,(select count(*) from campaign_member_tbl cmt where cmt.campaign_no=cct.campaign_no) as member_count, member_id from create_campaign_tbl cct
mapper.insert: insert into campaign_participance_tbl values( campaign_participance_seq.nextval, #{campaignThumb}, #{campaignMemo}, #{campaignNo}, sysdate, to_timestamp(#{campaignExpireDate}), #{memberId} )
